title: [CI:DOCS] Update Master to reflect the 3.0 release
body: Bump Readme and Release Notes for v3.0 release

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
